medium_findings.description: Publisher 'wgsl-tools' does not match GitHub org 'bijingdabaihua' in repo 'https://github.com/bijingdabaihua/wgsl-formatter'

Harvesting VSCode configuration and sending over network

info_findings.description: No domain associated with publisher profile
